lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: 'Ello, and what are you after then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need another assignment.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: You're actually very strong, are you sure you don't want Chaeldar in Zanaris to assign you a task?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No that's okay, I'll take a task from you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh okay then, I'll go talk to Chaeldar.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Excellent, you're doing great. Your new task is to kill [amount] [task monster].

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: You're still hunting [task monster], you have [amount] to go.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Although, it's not an assignment that I'd normally give... I guess I could give you a new assignment, if you'd like.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: If you do get a new one, you will reset your standard task streak of [task streak amount]. Is that okay? It won't affect your Wilderness task streak of [task streak amount].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: You're still hunting [monster], with [amount] to go.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: I don't think that's a suitable task for you. Shall I cancel it? This will not wipe your task streaks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please cancel it.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Alright, consider the task cancelled. You can now get a new assignment when you want one.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: No, thanks, I want to try doing it.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any rewards for me, or anything to trade?

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: I have quite a few rewards you can earn, and a wide variety of Slayer equipment for sale.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about the difficulty of my assignments.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: The Slayer Masters may currently assign you any task in our lists, regardless of your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine - I can handle any task.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: That's the spirit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In future, please don't give anything too tough.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: The Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine - I don't want anything too tough.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Okay, we'll keep checking your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stop checking my combat level - I can take anything!

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will assign you anything from their lists, regardless of your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, I'm here about the blessed axe again.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: I suppose you want a new axe?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, yes.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: You'll need to hand over both a mithril axe and holy symbol of Saradomin. You don't have an axe in your pack, so I'm not able to help.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Here's the replacement; be more careful with this one, eh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Goodbye, then. You may, of course, return if you decide you want a new axe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, I'm here about the blessed axe again.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: You already have an axe in your bag but you want another?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, yes.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: You'll need to hand over both a mithril axe and holy symbol of Saradomin. You don't have an axe in your pack, so I'm not able to help.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Here's the replacement; be more careful with this one, eh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not right now.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Goodbye, then. You may, of course, return if you decide you want a new axe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're filling in for Turael?

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: That I am. It's been quite a while since I last did this sort of thing, but my brother wants one last adventure, so here I am.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you've done this before?

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Oh yes. In fact, I was doing it before my brother was. Back in his adventuring days, I was the one here teaching people the basics.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: After Spria was born, he retired from his life of thrill- seeking. That's when he took over from me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting... I never knew that.

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: He doesn't talk about his adventures much, but once you get him going, you won't be able to make him stop!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: About Turael...

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: You need not share your condolences with me, adventurer. I've been prepared for this for a long time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You have?

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: My brother was a thrill-seeker his whole life. Even after he retired, I always knew something would come and pull him back in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And that something was me. I'm sorry...

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Don't be. He died doing what he loved, and he died a hero. He wouldn't have had it any other way.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... Nothing...

lines.speaker: Aya
lines.text: Very well done, take this.
